name: Corn Belt Energy Corporation
territory: McLean, DeWitt, Livingston, Woodford, and Tazewell counties, Illinois

netMetering.policy: Net metering at retail rate for systems ≤ 40 kW
netMetering.excessCreditPolicy: Carried forward monthly; zeroed annually in April
netMetering.notes: Illinois Net Metering Act (220 ILCS 5/16-107.5) applies; co-op members only

interconnection.applicationFeeNotes: Residential ≤ 10 kW; commercial/larger systems require additional engineering review fee

incentives.notes: Illinois Shines Adjustable Block Program (ABP) available; USDA REAP grants available for agricultural members
